creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 193342
patch: strip -mretpoline option

/etc/make.conf:
# Retpoline speculative execution vulnerability mitigation (CVE-2017-5715)
CFLAGS+=-mretpoline
CXXFLAGS+=-mretpoline
COPTFLAGS+=-mretpoline
